string.text:
The Vargo 52 is a rugged battle rifle chambered in 7.62x54r, featuring a 22-round detachable magazine for extended firepower. Utilizing a long-stroke gas piston system with a reinforced bolt and extended ejection port, it ensures reliable cycling and durability under harsh conditions. With a steady rate of fire and hard-hitting ballistics, the Vargo 52 excels in delivering sustained, accurate firepower suited for both frontline engagements and long-range support. .
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: KZRZP suppressor.
Magazine for the Vargo-52 rifle, holds 22 rounds of 7.62x54r ammunition. Smells like lemons. \n \n
